# Calm-todo

A small, opinionated todo app for solo founders and indie hackers. Local-first,
single-binary backend, with a minimalist web UI. Sharing is read-only via a
public link (no team mode). No mobile native app.

Audience:
- Indie hackers running 2-3 small projects
- Solo technical founders

Identity:
- Calm UX: no notifications, no badges, no streaks
- Local-first sync (CRDTs)
- Single-binary backend (Bun + SQLite)
- Read-only public sharing

Non-goals:
- Team collaboration
- Mobile native app
- Real-time multi-user editing

References:
- https://obsidian.md
- https://linear.app (for the calm UX feel only)
